# MuleSoft Einstein AI Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.2) of Einstein AI Connector documentation.
> See [Einstein AI Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/einstein-ai-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Einstein AI Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Configuring Agent Operations for Einstein AI Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/einstein-ai-connector/latest/configuring-agent-operations.md)
- [Configuring Chat Operations for Einstein AI Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/einstein-ai-connector/latest/configuring-chat-operations.md)
- [Configuring Embedding Operations for Einstein AI Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/einstein-ai-connector/latest/configuring-embeddings-operations.md)
- [Configuring RAG Operations for Einstein AI Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/einstein-ai-connector/latest/configuring-rag-operations.md)
- [Configuring Tools Operations for Einstein AI Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/einstein-ai-connector/latest/configuring-tools-operations.md)
- [Einstein AI Connector 1.2 - Additional Configuration Information](https://docs.mulesoft.com/einstein-ai-connector/latest/einstein-ai-additional-config.md)

- [Einstein AI Connector 1.2 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/einstein-ai-connector/latest/einstein-ai-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Einstein AI Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/einstein-ai-connector/latest/einstein-ai-connector-studio.md)
